type_buy_desc: Purchase an asset. This increases your holding quantity and decreases your cash balance.
type_sell_desc: Sell an asset. This decreases your holding quantity and increases your cash balance.
type_deposit_desc: Increase your account balance by adding funds.
type_withdrawal_desc: Decrease your account balance by taking out funds.
type_transfer_in_desc: Move funds into this account from another of your existing accounts. Note: This type of transfer typically doesn't count towards contribution limits.
type_transfer_out_desc: Move funds from this account to another of your existing accounts. Note: This type of transfer typically doesn't count towards contribution limits.
type_dividend_desc: Income received from owning shares in a company or units in a fund. This typically represents a distribution of profits.
type_interest_desc: Income earned from cash deposits, bonds, or lending money. This is a payment for the use of your money.
type_add_holding_desc: Record a new asset holding. This is similar to a "Buy" but does not impact your cash balance. Use this for initial holdings, assets transferred from another brokerage, holdings received (e.g., gifts, inheritance), or to quickly record a purchase without a separate deposit entry.
type_remove_holding_desc: Record the removal of an asset holding. This is similar to a "Sell" but does not impact your cash balance. Also use to record assets transferred out to another brokerage or holdings removed for reasons other than a sale (e.g., gifts, donations).
type_split_desc: Record a stock split. This changes the number of shares you own but typically not the total value of your holding (e.g., a 2-for-1 split doubles your shares).
type_fee_desc: Record a standalone fee or charge not directly tied to a specific trade, such as an account maintenance fee. This will decrease your cash balance.
type_tax_desc: Record tax payments related to your investments, such as capital gains tax or withholding tax. This will decrease your cash balance.
import_subtitle: Import your trading activities from CSV files
import_drag_drop: Drag and drop your CSV file here, or click to select
step_select_account_desc: Choose the account for these activities
step_map_columns_desc: Match CSV columns to activity fields
delete_activity_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this activity?
delete_selected_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected activities?
cash_balance_shortfall_hint: Record cash deposits to cover the shortfall, or use "Add Holding" (bypasses cash tracking).
update_transaction_desc: Update the details of your transaction
record_transaction_desc: Record a new transaction in your account.
description_placeholder: Add an optional description or comment for this transaction...
no_valid_holdings_desc: Please add at least one valid holding with ticker, shares, and average cost.
bulk_holdings_desc: Quickly add multiple holdings to your portfolio. Enter your current positions with ticker symbols, quantities, and average costs.
mobile_choose_account: Choose the account for this transaction
import_select_account_help: Make sure to select the account you want to import activities for
import_upload_csv_help: Upload a CSV file containing your investment activities. The file should include headers in the first row.
import_reading_file_desc: Please wait while the application processes your data.
import_map_columns_desc: Match your CSV columns to activity fields
datagrid_no_transactions: No transactions yet. Click "Add Transaction" to get started.
datagrid_changes_synced: Your pending changes are now synced.
datagrid_unsaved_cleared: Unsaved edits and drafts have been cleared.
import_help_description: Import your account activities from CSV files with automatic data normalization and flexible column mapping.
import_help_step_1: Ensure your CSV has headers with the required fields
import_help_step_2: Select account and upload your CSV file
import_help_step_3: Map CSV columns to required fields:
import_help_step_3_fields: date, symbol, quantity, activityType, unitPrice, currency, fee, amount
import_help_step_4: Map activity types and symbols if needed
import_help_step_5: Preview, verify, and import your activities
import_help_tip_text: Column names and activity types don't need to match exactly - you can map them during import. Mappings are saved for future imports.
import_help_amount_text: For cash activities (DIVIDEND, DEPOSIT, WITHDRAWAL, TAX, FEE, INTEREST, TRANSFER_IN, TRANSFER_OUT), amount is preferred when provided, otherwise calculated from quantity × unitPrice.
import_help_autoformat_text: Negative values, currency symbols ($, £, €), commas, and parentheses are automatically handled. No manual data cleanup needed.

manager.create_transaction: Create a new transaction or activity for your account
manager.synced_account_desc: This account uses Holdings tracking with broker sync. Holdings are updated automatically when you sync.
manager.holdings_tracking_mode_desc: This account uses Holdings tracking. To modify positions, use the Update button on the account page.

delete_modal.title: Delete activity?
delete_modal.description: This activity will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete_modal.linked_transfer_desc: This activity is linked to a transfer pair. Both sides will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

form_renderer.select_type: Select an activity type above to continue
form_renderer.not_editable: This activity type can't be edited here.

date_list.no_activities_desc: No activities were found for this date.
date_list.cash_already_negative: Cash was already negative before the first activity shown.
date_list.carry_forward: The negative balance was carried forward from activity on {{date}}. Review the cash impact and running balance below.
date_list.review_to_identify: Review the cash impact and running balance below to identify the activity that pushed cash below zero.
date_list.no_activity_found: No cash-impacting activity was found before this date. Cash may have been negative before available history, or a deposit/transfer may be missing.

link_transfer.unlink_desc: These two activities will become external transfers again.
link_transfer.link_desc: These two activities will be paired and treated as a single internal transfer or currency conversion.

transfer_match.link_desc: Choose the existing opposite transfer to pair with this activity.
transfer_match.clear_stale_desc: This stale transfer link will be cleared and the transfer will be marked external.
transfer_match.unlink_desc: This transfer pair will be split back into two external transfers.
transfer_match.no_counterpart_clear_hint: Unlinking will clear the stale transfer link on this row and mark it external.
transfer_match.no_matches_7_days: No matches within 7 days of this activity.
transfer_match.no_eligible_filters: No eligible transfers match the current filters.
transfer_match.warning_amount_mismatch: Amount or quantity does not exactly match.
transfer_match.warning_stale_link: Existing stale transfer link will be replaced.
transfer_match.error_load_pair: Could not load the linked transfer pair.

form.help_fmv_per_unit: Fair market value per share or token at the time you received it. Used to calculate income amount and cost basis.
form.contract_search_hint: Search by ticker, option contract, or paste an OCC symbol
form.warn_buy_while_short: You currently have a short position in this stock. Use Buy to Cover to reduce it; enter a normal Buy only after the short position is closed.
form.warn_cover_without_short: Buy to Cover requires an existing short position for this stock in the selected account.
form.warn_cover_quantity_excess: You are covering {{covering}} shares, but the current short position is {{short}} shares. Enter any excess as a separate Buy activity.
form.warn_selling_more_contracts: You are selling more contracts ({{selling}}) than your available holdings ({{available}}). This may create or extend a short option position.
form.warn_selling_more_shares: You are selling more shares ({{selling}}) than your available holdings ({{available}}). Split the excess into a separate Sell Short activity.
form.warn_sell_short_while_long: You currently hold {{available}} shares. Sell Short is for opening a short position; split this into a normal Sell first, then Sell Short for any remaining short quantity.
form.warn_sell_while_short: You already have a short position in this stock. Use Sell Short to increase it; enter a normal Sell only when you have a long position to close.
form.bulk_add_existing_desc: Quickly add multiple holdings to your portfolio. Enter your current positions with ticker symbols, quantities, and average costs. This will not affect your cash balance.
form.toast_no_valid_holdings_desc: Please add at least one valid holding with ticker, shares, and average cost.
form.toast_holdings_saved_desc: Your holdings have been added to this account.
form.toast_check_form_errors: Please check the form for errors.
form.err_accounts_different: Source and destination accounts must be different.
form.err_amount_positive_number: Amount must be a positive number.
form.err_fxrate_number: FX Rate must be a number.
form.err_open_or_close: Select whether this opens or closes a position.
form.err_split_ratio_number: Split ratio must be a number.
form.err_split_ratio_gt_zero: Split ratio must be greater than 0.
form.err_withholding_tax_number: Withholding tax must be a number.
form.err_fmv_number: FMV per unit must be a number.
form.err_fmv_gt_zero: FMV per unit must be greater than 0.
form.err_received_quantity_number: Received quantity must be a number.
form.err_received_quantity_gt_zero: Received quantity must be greater than 0.
form.err_enter_dividend_or_fmv: Enter either dividend amount or FMV per unit.
form.err_enter_interest_or_fmv: Enter either interest amount or FMV per unit.
form.err_sent_amount_number: Sent amount must be a number.
form.err_sent_amount_gt_zero: Sent amount must be greater than 0.
form.err_received_amount_number: Received amount must be a number.
form.err_received_amount_gt_zero: Received amount must be greater than 0.
form.err_cost_basis_number: Cost basis must be a number.
form.err_cost_basis_gt_zero: Cost basis must be greater than 0.
form.err_average_cost_number: Average cost must be a number.
form.err_average_cost_gt_zero: Average cost must be greater than 0
form.err_at_least_one_holding: At least one holding is required
form.err_select_symbol_from_search: Please select the symbol from search so quote currency is populated.
form.placeholder_note_or_comment: Add an optional note or comment...
form.err_enter_income_or_fmv: Please enter the income amount or FMV per unit.

pagination.jump_hint: Enter a page number between 1 and {{count}}

datagrid.save_before_link: Save or discard pending edits before linking this transfer.
datagrid.save_before_unlink: Save or discard pending edits before unlinking this transfer.
datagrid.link_reason_save_pending: Save pending edits before linking; FX conversion pairs must be one Transfer Out and one Transfer In
datagrid.link_reason_select_pair: Select one TRANSFER_IN and one TRANSFER_OUT activity
datagrid.link_reason_already_linked: One of the selected activities is already linked
datagrid.link_reason_same_account_fx: Same-account links must be cash FX conversions with different currencies
datagrid.unlink_reason_save_pending: Save or discard pending edits on the selected rows before unlinking
datagrid.unlink_reason_must_be_linked: Both selected activities must already be linked
datagrid.unlink_reason_different_transfers: Selected activities belong to different linked transfers
datagrid.warn_currencies_differ: Currencies differ ({{from}} → {{to}}). The pair will still be linked.
datagrid.unit_price_help: For buys and sells, enter the trade price. For staking rewards and in-kind dividends, enter the fair market value per unit at receipt; it sets income amount and cost basis.

table.no_activities_desc: Add your first activity to get started.

mobile_type_transfer_desc: Move cash or securities between accounts

mobile_form.save_failed_desc: Failed to save activity. Please check your inputs and try again.
mobile_form.err_transfer_amount_currencies: Transfer amount and currencies are required.
mobile_form.err_link_before_internal: Use Link transfer... to pair this existing transfer before saving it as internal.
mobile_form.err_internal_securities_both_legs: Editing an internal securities transfer requires both legs.

page.csvDisabledDescription: Holdings CSV import is disabled for connected accounts using Holdings tracking.

dialog.cancelDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel? All progress will be lost and you'll need to start over.

upload.selectAccountHelp: Choose the default account for imported activities. If your CSV includes an Account column with valid account ids, those will take priority for each row.
upload.uploadCsvHelp: After uploading, double-check the Parse Settings below — make sure the delimiter, date format, and rows to skip match your file.

template.label: Template
template.name: Template Name
template.notAvailable: The selected template is no longer available.
template.failedToApply: Failed to apply the import template.
template.failedToSave: Failed to save the import template.
template.failedToDelete: Failed to delete the import template.

mapping.noCsvDescription: Please go back and upload a valid file.
mapping.accountAssignmentBlankRows: Map every CSV row to an account. {{count}} rows are still blank, so choose a default account in Upload or fill the account column.
mapping.accountAssignmentBlankRow: Map every CSV row to an account. {{count}} row is still blank, so choose a default account in Upload or fill the account column.
mapping.accountAssignmentDefault: Choose a default account in Upload or map the CSV account column before continuing.
mapping.selectDefaultOrColumn: Select a default account or map an account column
mapping.usingSelectedForAll: Using selected account for all rows

columns.unitPriceHelp: For buys and sells, enter the trade price. For staking rewards and in-kind dividends, enter the fair market value per unit at receipt; it sets income amount and cost basis.

reviewToolbar.importAnywayTooltip: Import selected rows even if they match existing activities

review.noDataDescription: No CSV data available. Please go back and upload a file.
review.missingMappingDescription: Column mappings are not configured. Please go back and configure the mapping.
review.outOfDateTitle: Review validation is out of date
review.outOfDateDescription: You changed one or more activities after the last backend validation. Revalidate before continuing to import.
review.errorsDescription: {{valid}} of {{all}} rows are valid and ready to import. Fix errors below, or skip them to continue.
review.warningsDescription: All {{all}} activities are importable. Review warnings below or proceed.
review.excludedDescription_one: {{count}} activity is excluded. Your data is ready for import.
review.excludedDescription_other: {{count}} activities are excluded. Your data is ready for import.
review.allValidDescription: Your data is ready for import. You can still review and make adjustments if needed.

status.forcedDuplicate: Will be imported – overrides duplicate detection
status.duplicateOfLine: Duplicate of line {{line}} in this import batch
status.duplicateExisting: Duplicate of an existing activity in your portfolio

confirm.noActivitiesDescription: All activities have been skipped or have validation errors. Go back to review and fix any issues.
confirm.warningsDescription: {{count}} activities have warnings but will still be imported.
confirm.reviewSummary: Review the summary below, then click Import to proceed.
confirm.progressDescription: Please wait while the application processes your data.
confirm.failedToPrepareAssets: Failed to prepare assets for import.

result.failedDescription: An error occurred during import. Please review your data and try again.
result.holdingsSuccess: Your holdings have been successfully imported.
result.activitiesSuccess: Your activities have been successfully added to your portfolio.

assets.noAssetsDescription: This import only contains cash-style activities — you can continue to activity review.
assets.resolvingDescription: This may take a few minutes.
assets.allResolvedDescription: Ready to continue. You can still remap or edit any asset before confirming.
assets.needsFixingDescription: Search for the correct ticker or create a custom asset for each symbol.
assets.searchPlaceholder: Search by ticker, name or ISIN…
assets.newAssetsDescription: Auto-resolved from market data. Review and edit if anything looks off before importing.
assets.existingAssetsDescription: Already in your portfolio. No action needed, but you can still remap if required.
assets.currencyMismatch: CSV currency is {{csv}} but resolved to {{resolved}}
assets.editDialogDescription: Adjust the resolved asset details. Edits apply only to this import.
assets.createDialogDescription: Create a new asset and link these rows to it immediately.

holdings.existingOverwritten_one: {{count}} snapshot date already exists and will be overwritten: {{dates}}
holdings.existingOverwritten_other: {{count}} snapshot dates already exist and will be overwritten: {{dates}}
holdings.importantDescription: Importing will create or update snapshots for each date in your CSV. Existing snapshots for the same dates will be replaced.
holdings.failedToPrepareAssets: Failed to prepare assets for import.

symbolPanel.description: Search and map these symbols to the correct ticker or mark them custom, then apply. If you mark custom, an asset with this symbol will be automatically created during import. If the asset with this symbol already exists, it will be reused instead of creating a duplicate.

help.activitiesIntro: Import your account activities from CSV files with automatic data normalization and flexible column mapping.
help.activitiesStep1: — Select a built-in or custom format template, or upload your CSV directly
help.activitiesStep2: — Map CSV columns to fields, map activity types and symbols to recognized values
help.activitiesStep3: — Review and resolve asset matches for imported symbols
help.activitiesStep4: — Validate, edit, skip, or fix activities inline before importing
help.activitiesRequiredFields: date, activityType, symbol, quantity, unitPrice, amount
help.activitiesOptionalFields: account, currency, fee, tax, comment, fxRate, subtype, instrumentType, isin
help.activitiesTip: Column names and activity types don't need to match exactly — you can map them during import. Mappings can be saved as custom templates for future imports.
help.activitiesAmount: Use amount for cash activities and cash transfers. Security transfers use quantity and cost basis; market value is derived from quotes.
help.activitiesAutoFormatting: Negative values, currency symbols ($, £, €), commas, and parentheses are automatically handled. No manual data cleanup needed.
help.holdingsIntro: Import point-in-time snapshots of your portfolio holdings. Each row represents a position held on a specific date.
help.holdingsStep1: Ensure your CSV has headers with the required fields
help.holdingsStep2: Select account and upload your CSV file
help.holdingsTip: Column names are auto-detected (e.g. "ticker" maps to symbol, "shares" maps to quantity). You can adjust mappings during import.
help.holdingsCashBalances: as the symbol to import cash balances. The quantity represents the cash amount.
help.holdingsSnapshots: Rows with the same date are grouped into a single snapshot. Multiple snapshots across different dates can be imported at once.

errors.saveMappingDescription: There was a problem saving your import mapping.
errors.importErrorDescription: Please try again or report an issue if the problem persists.

validationAlert.issuesTitle: There are issues with {{count}} activity entries.
validationAlert.issuesDescription: Please review them in the table below and either correct or remove these entries to proceed with the import.
validationAlert.issuesHint: Hover over the error icon on each line for more details about the specific issue.
